# Support

Thank you for using ToatCloud Terminal. This document outlines how to get help,
report issues, and engage with the community.

## Getting Help

### Documentation

- [README.md](README.md) - Installation, quick start, and features
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) - Community guidelines
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) - Security policy and vulnerability reporting
- [TERMS.md](TERMS.md) - Terms of use
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) - Version history and release notes
- [DEVELOPER_PROMPT.md](DEVELOPER_PROMPT.md) - Comprehensive guide for AI and developers
- [docs/](docs/) - Full documentation

### Quick Start

```bash
npm i -g toatcloud-terminal
toatcloud-terminal -help
```

For common setup and usage issues, see the
[troubleshooting section](https://github.com/Seigh-sword/ToatVM/issues) or
existing discussions.

## Reporting Bugs

If you encounter a bug, please help us fix it by providing detailed information.

1. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/Seigh-sword/ToatVM/issues) to
   avoid duplicates
2. Use the [bug report template](https://github.com/Seigh-sword/ToatVM/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
3. Include steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, and your environment

### Useful Debug Info

- ToatCloud Terminal version (`toatcloud-terminal -version`)
- Node.js version (`node -v`)
- Operating system
- GitHub Actions runner logs (accessible from your repo's Actions tab)
- Tunnel URL (do not share publicly if sensitive)

## Requesting Features

We welcome feature requests. Before submitting one:

1. Check if the feature has already been requested
2. Review the roadmap in open issues
3. Use the [feature request template](https://github.com/Seigh-sword/ToatVM/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

Describe the problem you are solving, your proposed solution, and any
alternatives you have considered.

## Community Channels

- **GitHub Issues**: Bug reports, feature requests, and general discussion
- **GitHub Discussions**: Questions, ideas, and community chat
- **GitHub Actions Logs**: For debugging VM runner issues, check the Actions
  tab in your fork or repository

## Security Reporting

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it privately.

- **Do NOT** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues
- Email security reports to: zack.yt.7085@gmail.com
- Subject line: `SECURITY: ToatCloud Terminal`

Please include as much detail as possible:

- Type of vulnerability
- Affected files and locations
- Steps to reproduce
- Proof-of-concept or exploit code (if available)
- Impact assessment

See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for the full security policy and response
timeline.

## Commercial Support

ToatCloud Terminal is an open-source, community-driven project. Commercial
support is not officially offered, but the maintainers may be reached at
zack.yt.7085@gmail.com for partnership inquiries.
